title: Good place for episode scripts
wikitext:
[]: Good place for episode scripts?             Quote Post by Nytloc » Sat Nov 15, 2008 10:01 pm Hey, a newbie here, so go easy on me, please. :p I've been looking around these boards, mostly on the bigger theories common to this board, and holy crap, a lot of this is new to me. Female Kaworu, a possible case of Misato sexually abusing Shinji, and angel chunks! This place freaking rocks! Anyway, as I'm sure my topic title has already adequately explained, I'm looking for a good place for the episode scripts before I start heavy posting. Half-way through my third viewing of the series (all in half a years' time!), I turned on the subtitles and was blown away by all the little things I'd missed. I notice a lot of you guys quote from some kind of script, could you tell me where you guys generally take it from? Of course, I primarily want the Japanese since it's the purest canon, but I'd also like the dub scripts if available, since I always watch it dubbed. Thanks in advance, -Nytloc Regallus Lightkeeper (yes, it's a funny name)

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Sat Nov 15, 2008 10:24 pm Well, there is the Eva Sage for starters. He has translations, so be wary. Also, most of his theories on that page have been disproven and would look batshit nuts even by Reichu's high standards. When I started, I know I was sucked in by his "angels are aliens" theory, and have been trying to re-think my fanfic proposal ever since I had that cleared up. I believe Reichu herself has some translations herself somewhere, but I don't know where to find it.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Nov 15, 2008 11:21 pm The Literal Translation Project should have the complete TV series. It's one of those sites I'm always surprised to see is still up, since I'm not sure it's been updated in this decade.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 16, 2008 3:52 am Transcripts of ADV's Platinum subs . Much, much better than LTP (although, obviously, not as easy to get). ...Female Kaworu is one of the reasons this place rocks? Who knew?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Nov 16, 2008 10:41 pm Reichu wrote: Transcripts of ADV's Platinum subs .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 16, 2008 11:00 pm Same exact file.

[]: Movie script.             Quote Post by Nytloc » Sun Nov 23, 2008 3:53 pm Sorry for such a long time between posts, but I was wondering if you guys also have a script for End of Evangelion? I compiled all of the scripts on my computer so I can read them later, and did a search for End of Evangelion script, but had no luck. Thanks again. -Nytloc

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 23, 2008 4:06 pm The best one is available here: http://www.evaotaku.com/
